name: Deployment Result to Plane and Slack
purpose: Move Plane tasks into Deploying when GitHub Actions deployment starts, then update Plane and Slack after the post-merge publish-and-verify job finishes.

security.recommended: Validate X-Hub-Signature-256 using the GitHub webhook secret stored in n8n credentials.

nodes.name: CONFIG
nodes.notes: First workflow node after the trigger. Store all shared constants here instead of n8n global variables.

values.slack_deploy_channel: Slack channel for deployment result messages

outputs.plane_issue_id: Plane issue ID recovered from merged PR body, issue body, or commit metadata
outputs.plane_project_id: Plane project ID recovered from merged PR body or linked issue body
outputs.github_issue_number: GitHub source issue number recovered from merged PR body

nodes.name: Find merged PR for deployment SHA
Resolve Plane task from PR or issue metadata
Resolve Plane deployment state
nodes.request: List Plane states for plane_project_id and choose Deploying, Done, Review, or Blocked by name.

nodes.name: Move Plane task to Deploying
nodes.condition: workflow_run.status is not completed and plane_issue_id exists
nodes.request: Use Plane API to move task to Deploying before publish and verification complete.

nodes.name: Move Plane task to Done
nodes.condition: workflow_run.status equals completed, conclusion equals success, and plane_issue_id exists
nodes.request: Use Plane API to move task to Done only after the post-merge deploy job publishes n8n workflows and all verification steps pass.

nodes.name: Comment GitHub Issue Completed
nodes.condition: conclusion equals success and plane_issue_id and github_issue_number exist
nodes.request: Add a completion comment with PR URL, deployment run URL, and commit SHA.
nodes.on_error: Continue to Slack notification; issue closure is secondary to Plane status.

nodes.name: Close GitHub Issue Completed
nodes.condition: conclusion equals success and plane_issue_id and github_issue_number exist
nodes.request: Edit issue state to closed with state_reason completed.
nodes.on_error: Continue to Slack notification; issue closure is secondary to Plane status.

nodes.name: Move Plane task to Blocked or Review
nodes.condition: workflow_run.status equals completed, conclusion is not success, and plane_issue_id exists
nodes.request: Use Plane API to move task out of Deploying and add the deployment run link. Use Review for code/test failures and Blocked for missing external prerequisites.

nodes.name: Send deployment result
nodes.on_error: Respond 502 so GitHub webhook delivery can be retried.

safe_failure_handling: Process only Deploy After Merge workflow_run events.
Move Plane to Deploying when the GitHub deploy workflow starts.
The GitHub deploy workflow must publish n8n workflows from the repo builder before a successful result can be treated as Done.
Fail deploys when n8n workflow specs changed without matching builder/import implementation.
If Plane cannot be resolved, still notify Slack with the deployment result and run URL.
Use plane_project_id from PR or issue metadata for all Plane API calls.
Resolve state IDs dynamically by state name in the Plane project before updating status.
If Plane update fails, Slack message must include manual repair instructions.
Close the linked GitHub issue only after a successful deploy with both a resolved Plane issue ID and a resolved GitHub issue number.
Do not close linked GitHub issues on failed deploys.
Never deploy from n8n; n8n only reacts to GitHub Actions deployment results.
Use GitHub webhook retries for transient Slack or Plane API failures.
